text:
13 PRs merged this week. mostly we played musical chairs with model providers (Wan, Qwen, Kimi, Claude Fable) so things stay fast and reliable. the dashboard got a much-needed glow-up — borderless UI, live model catalog, and a single-accent theme. we also added some API sanity: content policy rejections now correctly return 422s instead of 500s, and boolean query params parse properly. plus, websim BYOP compliance and a @pollinations/ui browser bundle so you don't even have to build to build. code is open, link in bio. 🌿🐝

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #buildinpublic #uiux #api
